summary: WhatCEM Sandbox Sprint 1-2-3 validation PASSED. Public preview now shows WhatCEM app (no longer placeholder). All 27 backend API tests pass. All frontend navigation and UI flows work correctly. Fixed MongoDB next_sequence conflict bug.

fixed_this_iteration.issue: MongoDB ConflictingUpdateOperators error in next_sequence function - $setOnInsert and $inc both trying to set 'value'

critical_code_review_comments: All critical data-testid attributes are present: analytics-bi-whatsapp-card, analytics-bi-voice-card, campaign-dashboard-open-voice-ai-button
Navigation between all routes works correctly: /, /settings/lead-assignment, /campaigns, /campaigns/voice, /analytics
Toast notifications working for all actions
seed_data_creation: Test data created via pytest: TEST_Campaign_Pytest, TEST_Voice_Campaign_Pytest, etc.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatCEM Sandbox is fully functional. All Sprint 1 (Lead Assignment), Sprint 2 (Campaign AI + Voice AI), and Sprint 3 Phase 1 (Analytics BI) endpoints and UI are working. External integrations (Twilio Voice, Gupshup WhatsApp, AI optimizations) are MOCKED/SIMULATED as expected for sandbox.

mocked_apis_list: Twilio Voice (simulated - test-call returns queued status)
Gupshup WhatsApp (simulated - notifications return sent status)
AI Campaign Optimizations (simulated - returns hardcoded optimized content)

test_credentials: No auth required for sandbox. Production credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md not used.
